summary: Ragged performance with a hot, sub‑par recording that isn’t recommended for regular listening
review: The show was described as “ok but ragged,” with Jerry’s entrance noted more than his playing. Reviewers felt the audio is overly hot and not worth downloading except for those who were present. Overall it’s a middling concert that lacks both musical polish and clean sound.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; the show is considered ragged and the recording hot/poor, leading to a low combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "hot," implying distortion or excessive tape speed; no clear comments on clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Show was merely okay and felt ragged, lacking smooth pacing or highlights.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Only his entrance is mentioned (walking up stairs); no comment on guitar work.
